title: Enchantment Roulette
description: Enchantment Roulette is a simple mod where breaking any block gives a random item in your inventory a random enchantment at level 1. If you get the same enchantment again on that item, it upgrades gradually.
body:
Enchantment Roulette started as a small mod I made for some friends, but I figured, why not upload it and let others enjoy it too?

Whenever you break a block, a random item in your inventory receives a random level 1 enchantment. If that same enchantment is applied to the same item again, it will gradually level up over time.

The mod doesn’t include Silk Touch or any curse enchantments, such as Curse of Vanishing or Curse of Binding. My friends didn’t want them, and since I don’t know how to make a config screen yet, I’ve left them out for now.
